outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran war news as Vance meets Pakistan PM ahead of US-Iran talks
outlets.summary: CNN covers Vance-Sharif bilateral as Saturday peace talks approach. Iran delegation in place. Frozen assets dispute, mine crisis, and CPI fallout all dominating.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump fumes as Iran retains choke hold on Strait of Hormuz ahead of peace talks
outlets.summary: WaPo reports Trump frustrated by Iran's continued Hormuz leverage despite ceasefire. Strait effectively closed.

outlets.name: Newsweek
outlets.headline: Iran War Live Updates: New 24-Hour Deadline Looms as Trump Warns Strikes May Resume
outlets.summary: Newsweek covers Trump's de facto 24-hour deadline warning. Warships 'loading up' with 'best weapons.' Vance in Islamabad.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Iran Has No Idea Where It Planted Mines In Strait Of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Daily Caller covers US officials' revelation that Iran cannot find its own mines. Clearance estimated 6-10 weeks.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: US, Iranian officials to hold ceasefire talks in Pakistan
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog covering Day 43 developments: Vance-Sharif bilateral, Iran red lines (Hormuz, Lebanon, enrichment), Araghchi 'complete distrust' statement.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: US inflation surges to 3.3% as Iran war fuels energy price shock
outlets.summary: Euronews covers CPI data showing war-driven inflation surge. Gasoline +21.2% monthly — biggest jump since 1967.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel Chose Force Over Negotiating With Lebanon, So Now It Faces Fickle Trump
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis: Israel prioritized military action over diplomacy with Lebanon. Now faces unpredictable Trump at Islamabad talks.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: US says Iran lost track of mine locations spread in Strait of Hormuz, complicating reopening
outlets.summary: JPost reports US officials say Iran cannot find its own mines. Navigational maps released. Mine clearance could take 6-10 weeks.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran enters talks with US in Islamabad with 'complete distrust': FM Araghchi
outlets.summary: PressTV leads with Araghchi's 'complete distrust' statement. Also reports US agreed to release frozen Iranian assets (US denies).

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: President Pezeshkian: Iran will never abandon Lebanon in face of Israeli aggression
outlets.summary: Iranian president vows solidarity with Lebanon despite ceasefire. Warns Israeli strikes 'violate temporary truce.'
